evidence.snippet: Development and production of antennas and antenna systems.

PIDSOS's blade antennas provide reliable audio, video and data transmission in any situation. Thanks to their unique aerodynamic and lightweight design, they are ideal antennas for applications on vehicles, aircrafts and UAVs.
PIDSO at XPONENTIAL Europe 2026 in Düsseldorf. Showcasing high-end antenna solutions for UAVs and technological highlights from our commercial and defense portfolios at booth 1D36.

items.notes: Designs and manufactures antennas and antenna systems explicitly targeting UAVs; blade antennas described as ideal for UAVs; exhibiting at XPONENTIAL for UAV antenna solutions; also makes COFDM video power amplifiers for video data links

evidence.snippet: The company became a limited liability company and first large orders were realized. With the production of antennas for unmanned systems and cable cars, PIDSO entered new business segments. Over the next few years, PIDSO received many awards including the **Mercur Innovation Award** and the **WKO TOP Exporter Title.** PIDSO became a distribution partner of MobileMark and L-com.

**Ultra-lightweight and aerodynamic**
PIDSOS's blade antennas provide reliable audio, video and data transmission in any situation. Thanks to their unique aerodynamic and lightweight design, they are ideal antennas for applications on vehicles, aircrafts and UAVs.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures and sells antenna components (blade, fin, array, button, horn, vivaldi, panel, stick antennas) and RF power amplifiers that are integrated into UAVs and other unmanned systems; also distributes L-com and MobileMark RF components

evidence.snippet:
**Ultra-lightweight and aerodynamic**
PIDSOS's blade antennas provide reliable audio, video and data transmission in any situation. Thanks to their unique aerodynamic and lightweight design, they are ideal antennas for applications on vehicles, aircrafts and UAVs.

### Array Antennas
**High-performance and reliable**
PIDSOS's array antennas can master any connection challenge with their elaborated antenna arrangement and special radiance characteristics. Protected by a dust-proof and waterproof case, they are particularly suitable for outdoor use.

### Button Antennas
**Extremely robust and compact**
PIDSO´s button antennas are characterized by their particularly robust and compact design. Despite of their small size and weight, they provide excellent omni-directional radiation performance.

### Horn Antennas
**Long range performance at minimum weight**
PIDSO's horn antennas are used wherever a reliable directional connection is needed. Due to their very wide band capabilities as well as their extremely lightweight construction, they can be used for various applications.

### Vivaldi Antennas
Due to the ultra-broadband characteristics of the PIDSO vivaldi antennas, different applications can be realized with only one antenna.

### Fin Antennas
**Optimal remote control**
PIDSO´s fin antennas are especially designed to meet the needs of remote-controlled aircrafts. In addition to their particularly lightweight design, they impress with their excellent connection stability over long distances.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/fin-antennen)

### Panel Antenna
**Reliable LTE MIMO performance**
Due to their dipolar construction, PIDSO's panel antennas are particularly suitable for LTE MIMO applications. Thanks to their stable design and good insulation, they are extremely robust against chemical influences and other challenging environmental conditions.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/panel-antennen)

### Stick Antennas
PIDSO’s stick antennas can be used for various applications due to their high gain and omnidirectional radiation pattern. They provide good coverage for video transmission, IEEE 82.11xx wireless LAN, Bluetooth and wireless access points. The rugged material and discreet design make them ideal for demanding outdoor applications.
[Read more](/en/overview/stick-antennas)

items.name: COFDM Power Amplifier
items.product_type: RF power amplifier for broadband video transmission

evidence.snippet: **PIDSO’s range of power amplifiers are used in various domains, primarily for broadband video transmission using COFDM modulation.**
The portfolio encompasses RF and microwave amplifiers with operating frequencies up to 10GHz (to be extended) and power levels up to 40dBm for continuous wave or pulsed applications.

PIDSO is an internationally recognized specialist in the development and manufacture of antennas and antenna systems. PIDSO antennas are characterized by their high quality and reliability. They are used by customers worldwide in various industries such as aviation, event production, motorsport or infrastructure providers.

readiness.notes: Offers off-the-shelf catalog products (blade, array, button, horn, vivaldi, stick, fin, panel antennas) plus custom-engineered solutions; EN 9100 certified aerospace quality management

tagline: Austrian antenna and RF component manufacturer producing blade, array, button, horn, Vivaldi, fin, panel, patch, and stick antenna families plus COFDM power amplifiers for UAV, automotive, aviation, and broadband applications. In production across multiple form factors. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of major program integration or US defense contracts absent.
